summary: A build step attempted to download a nydus release tarball with wget and received an HTTP 502 from GitHub, causing the RUN step to fail and the build to abort.
root_cause: The Dockerfile RUN step invoking wget to fetch the nydus release from GitHub failed with HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway / proxy error, exiting with code 1 and aborting the build.

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows the wget command returned a 502 Bad Gateway indicating the download from GitHub failed.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: BuildKit reports the wget process exited with code 1 and that caused the failure to solve the build graph.

evidence.quote:
Dockerfile:336
--------------------
  334 |     ARG TARGETARCH
  335 |     SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-c"]
  336 | >>> RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz
evidence.reason: Identifies the Dockerfile line that runs wget to fetch the nydus artifact that failed.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:17.4611288Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" ... error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/...
evidence.reason: Additional fetch failures and 'context canceled' entries indicate transient network/registry request problems occurred during the build.

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job (transient network error). If failures persist, mirror or vendor the nydus artifact or add retry/backoff to the Dockerfile download (e.g., use curl/wget with --tries/backoff or a fallback URL), or cache the tarball in CI to avoid relying on the external GitHub download during the build.
